name: eris-payment-as-a-service
description: Modular payment processing platform — agents, skills, and commands for the full transaction lifecycle

plugins.name: payment-processing
plugins.description: Core transaction lifecycle — authorization, capture, settlement, refunds, voids

plugins.name: fraud-detection
plugins.description: Real-time fraud scoring, rule engines, ML model integration, case management

plugins.name: compliance-aml
plugins.description: KYC/AML screening, sanctions checks, SAR filing, regulatory reporting

plugins.name: merchant-services
plugins.description: Merchant onboarding, underwriting, MCC classification, fee schedules

plugins.name: treasury-management
plugins.description: Cash positioning, FX hedging, liquidity forecasting, bank connectivity

plugins.name: settlement-clearing
plugins.description: Batch settlement, interchange optimization, network reconciliation

plugins.name: digital-wallets
plugins.description: Tokenization, wallet lifecycle, P2P transfers, stored value management

plugins.name: transaction-processor
plugins.description: End-to-end payment orchestration agent with authorization, capture, and settlement subagents

plugins.name: fraud-analyzer
plugins.description: Real-time fraud scoring and case review agent with scorer, investigator, and reporter subagents

plugins.name: chargeback-handler
plugins.description: Dispute lifecycle management agent with intake, evidence-building, and resolution subagents

plugins.name: merchant-onboarder
plugins.description: Merchant application processing agent with doc-reader, underwriter, and provisioner subagents

plugins.name: compliance-screener
plugins.description: AML/KYC screening workflow agent with doc-parser, rules-engine, and escalator subagents

plugins.name: settlement-agent
plugins.description: Batch settlement orchestration agent with aggregator, netter, and poster subagents

plugins.name: reconciliation-agent
plugins.description: Cross-system reconciliation agent with matcher, break-finder, and resolver subagents

plugins.name: risk-assessor
plugins.description: Transaction and portfolio risk scoring agent with data-puller, modeler, and reporter subagents

plugins.name: payment-router
plugins.description: Intelligent payment routing agent with analyzer, optimizer, and executor subagents

plugins.name: dispute-resolver
plugins.description: End-to-end dispute resolution agent with intake, investigator, and decision-maker subagents

plugins.name: stripe-connector
plugins.description: Stripe payment processing MCP integration — charges, subscriptions, payouts

plugins.name: adyen-connector
plugins.description: Adyen omnichannel payments MCP integration — POS, online, marketplace

plugins.name: plaid-connector
plugins.description: Plaid financial data MCP integration — account linking, identity verification, transactions
